title: Totem of Evoker
description: Just Totem of Undying, but looks similar to Evoker.
body: I changed _Totem of Undying_ to _Totem of Evoker_, because we get it from Evoker and it looks sweet. It's just a new texture for _Totem of Undying_. It also changes name of totem to _Totem of Evoker_ in couple languages.
